input.organisation_context: 300 employee company working on data visualization Category: cloud_storage. No vendor filter selected.
success_factors: Select the strongest vendor for storage for the company.

criteria.label: Data Reliability
criteria.description: Guaranteed uptime and durability metrics for stored data assets.

criteria.label: Scalability
criteria.description: Ability to handle increasing data volumes from visualization workloads without performance degradation.

criteria.label: Subscription Cost
criteria.description: Monthly or annual recurring costs for storage capacity and egress fees.

criteria.label: TCO
criteria.description: Comprehensive cost including storage, data transfer, and management overhead.

criteria.label: Security & Confidentiality
criteria.description: Encryption standards and access control mechanisms to ensure data privacy.

criteria.label: Vendor Stability
criteria.description: Financial health and market longevity of the cloud storage provider.

criteria.label: Sustainability
criteria.description: Carbon footprint of data centers and commitment to renewable energy usage.

criteria.label: Data Residency
criteria.description: Ability to control the geographic location of stored data to meet compliance requirements.
